itemListElement.reviewBody:
Please don't take admission based on good reviews on Google. If you can see it is posted almost before 3 and 4 months, means at the time when admission process start for new acedemic year.
I took admission last your after heard about brand name of podar, but my experience was not good and I withdraw my kid from this school.
1. Only one thing I like is teachers are qualified and supportive.
2. Management is very poor,
informed everything on last moment weather it is about function or picnic or submission of books etc...
3. Admin staff is very rude, they  always reply rudely, they misplaced my application of leaving certificate, not given on time and behaved rudely even though it was their mistake to not keep the documents submitted safely and carefully.
4. At home we always try to keep less screen time for kids and in this school they start cartoon on projecter in lunch break so that teacher don't need to handle kids.
5. Some teacher checks books and some not and some just put right mark and sign without checking mistakes of kids, management does not bother weather teachers are checking books or not.
6. At the time of admission they told 6 month indoor activities and 6 month outdoor sports will be there but no one one guided for any sport activity during year. No computer practical was taught.
7. I first time saw a school who is not allowing the kids to see annual function if they have not participated. School should encourage non participant to come and see annual function so that kids can enjoy and next year they may motivate to take part.
8. Only half of the lessons from the books was completed and many lessons omitted, specially from November to January no study done only focussed on annual function and sports day.

Podar International School Wakad-
1) School fees are very high.
2) Teachers are very hardworking for all kids
3) Management not good, for a simple things parents have to visit the school number of times few staffs are very rude and never respond, they don't try to understand that parents also are employed in somewhere.
4) if anyone thinking to take admission in this school please dedicatedly assign someone for your child because one person always required to take care the school related things.
5) Too much homework
6) You can't connect to the reception number as this is always busy number.
7) School staff never respond on your call and WhatsApp.
8) Security at the main gate are very rude they never allow you to enter in the school premises if you need any documents from the school, if you are in the school gate even you can't connect to the employee inside the school.
9) infrastructure are good
10) Education they are providing upto the mark

The school provides a Good environment where students are encouraged to grow both academically and personally.

The teachers at this school are dedicated, knowledgeable, and genuinely care about the success of students."

Overall, this school provides an excellent education and is a great place for students to learn and grow.

The standard of the school and the quality of education is good. As parents we find the school and teachers very supportive and always available to help and support. My daughter is studying in the school since this year and it has been a great experience. Teachers are very thoughtful and put a lot of thought into how to present the material. I would highly recommend this school to anyone interested in learning.
Thank you Principal sir and all the teachers and staff of PIS.

Greetings!!
This review is for PIS wakad branch.
My son is in 4th std and studying here from 1st STD and he is enjoying here with calm environment. Study/sports/cultural activities etc is well managed by school. Recently they added and completed few more floors which gives good feel for expansion. Overall it was good experience in terms of curriculum/PTM/Gathering/online schooling etc.Hoping for the best career for all children in future.

Thanks
